name: Cellulant
description: Cellulant — Pan-African payment gateway supporting 35+ African countries with mobile money, bank transfer, and card collection.

seo.title: Cellulant — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Cellulant: Cellulant — Pan-African payment gateway supporting 35+ African countries with mobile money, bank transfer, and card collection.

when_to_use: Mobile money collection across 35 African countries via single API
Bank transfer and card payments for pan-African e-commerce
Cross-border settlement for global platforms entering African markets
Disbursements to mobile wallets in East and West Africa simultaneously

review.verdict: One of the few true pan-African aggregators — valuable if you need breadth, painful if you need polish.
review.best_for: Businesses accepting mobile money and cards across many African markets
review.not_for: Single-country African merchants better served by local specialists
